subcodes.first_line: Blessed is he who hath drawn from the ocean of My utterance, turned towards My horizon, and acknowledged My sovereignty which hath encompassed the horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لمن اغترف من بحر بیانی و توجه الی افقی و اعترف بسلطانی الذی احاط الآفاق
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement
